headline: Jim Cramer Says Stocks Like Seagate  “Are Really Overextended” For Him
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ:STX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer was slightly bearish on the stock during the episode, as he commented: Seagate, which had just reported a terrific quarter, but with Western Digital, Sandisk, those stocks though, are really overextended for me. headline: Why Are Seagate (STX) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of data storage manufacturer Seagate (NASDAQ:STX) jumped 5.3% in the morning session after the stock's positive momentum continued as the company reported strong third-quarter financial results and provided an upbeat forecast, driven by surging demand for its AI data storage solutions.
